HomePage.title: A calm starting point for bilingual nutrition tracking.
HomePage.description: This foundation sets up English and Hebrew routes, direction-aware layout, and a small public shell for future reviewable feature work.

status.title: Foundation only
status.body: Search, diary, accounts, barcode scanning, recipes, targets, and food databases are intentionally not implemented yet.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.description: Use email and password access for this foundation account flow.

signUp.title: Create account
signUp.description: Create a foundation account with email and password.

status.ready: This form uses Supabase auth when local environment values are configured. Profile and target setup is available after sign-in.
status.checkEmail: Check your email to finish creating the account. The confirmation callback route is not implemented yet.

errors.authFailed: We could not complete that auth request. Check the details and try again.
errors.missingConfig: Supabase environment values are missing on this machine.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

Setup.label: Setup
Setup.title: Set up your profile and manual targets.
Setup.subtitle: Add only the basics for now. Targets are optional and can stay blank until you are ready to enter them manually.

profile.displayNameHelp: This name is only for the app interface. Unit system remains metric for this foundation.

targets.title: Manual daily targets
targets.description: Enter targets you chose yourself. This app does not calculate calorie or nutrition targets.
targets.blankHelper: Blank means not set. Zero means an intentional value of 0.

status.idle: Save when the profile details are ready. Manual targets can be left blank.

errors.generic: We could not save setup right now. Try again in a moment.
errors.unauthenticated: Sign in again before saving setup.
errors.profile: We could not save the profile details.
errors.target: The profile was saved, but we could not save the target details.
errors.validation: Check the highlighted fields and try again.
errors.displayNameTooLong: Display name must be 80 characters or fewer.
errors.invalidNumber: Enter a valid number or leave the field blank.
errors.invalidInteger: Calories must be a whole number.

today.label: Today workspace
today.title: Your protected nutrition space is ready for the next layer.
today.description: This signed-in area confirms account access and session handling. Food logging, targets, diary history, and dashboard calculations are intentionally not implemented yet.
today.placeholderBody: Future reviewable work can add diary and nutrition views here after the setup flow is reviewed.
today.setupCalloutBody: Create your profile row intentionally and optionally add manual targets before future diary work begins.
today.targetEmptyTitle: Manual targets are not set yet
today.targetEmptyBody: Your profile is ready. Add targets only when you have values you want to enter manually; the app does not calculate recommendations.

targetSummary.title: Manual daily targets
targetSummary.body: These values are the targets you entered. They are not calculated recommendations.
